llm_calls.prompt:
Task prompt:
Opprett og send ein faktura til kunden Bølgekraft AS (org.nr 892362416) på 34150 kr eksklusiv MVA. Fakturaen gjeld Vedlikehald.

Base URL: https://tx-proxy-jwanbnu3pq-lz.a.run.app/v2
Authentication: Basic Auth with username "0" and the session token.

Analyze this task and provide the JSON array of API calls needed to complete it.
Remember: be precise and minimal. Each unnecessary call or error hurts the score.
llm_calls.response:
I need to create and send an invoice for customer Bølgekraft AS for 34,150 NOK excl. VAT for "Vedlikehald" (Maintenance).

Let me break down the steps:
1. Create a department (needed for employee)
2. Create an employee (needed as project manager/order receiver)
3. Create the customer Bølgekraft AS
4. Create a product for "Vedlikehald"
5. Create an order with order line
6. Create and send the invoice

Let me first check VAT types to get the correct ID for standard 25% MVA.

```json
[
  {"method": "GET", "path": "/ledger/vatType?number=3", "body": null, "description": "Get VAT type for 25% outgoing MVA"},
  {"method": "POST", "path": "/department", "body": {"name": "Avdeling", "departmentNumber": 1}, "description": "Create department"},
  {"method": "POST", "path": "/employee", "body": {"firstName": "Admin", "lastName": "Brukar", "email": "admin@bolgekraft.no", "userType": "STANDARD", "department": {"id": "{result_1_id}"}}, "description": "Create employee", "depends_on": 1},
  {"method": "POST", "path": "/customer", "body": {"name": "Bølgekraft AS", "email": "post@bolgekraft.no", "organizationNumber": "892362416", "isCustomer": true, "invoiceEmail": "post@bolgekraft.no"}, "description": "Create customer Bølgekraft AS"},
  {"method": "POST", "path": "/product", "body": {"name": "Vedlikehald", "priceExcludingVatCurrency": 34150, "vatType": {"id": "{result_0_id}"}}, "description": "Create product Vedlikehald", "depends_on": 0},
  {"method": "POST", "path": "/order", "body": {"customer": {"id": "{result_3_id}"}, "deliveryDate": "2025-07-10", "orderDate": "2025-07-10", "receiver": {"id": "{result_2_id}"}, "orderLines": [{"product": {"id": "{result_4_id}"}, "count": 1, "unitPriceExcludingVatCurrency": 34150, "description": "Vedlikehald"}]}, "description": "Create order with order line", "depends_on": 4},
  {"method": "PUT", "path": "/order/{prev_id}/:invoice", "body": {"invoiceDate": "2025-07-10", "invoiceDueDate": "2025-08-09", "sendToCustomer": true}, "description": "Invoice the order and send to customer", "depends_on": 5}
]
```

plan.description: Get VAT type for 25% outgoing MVA
Invoice the order and send to customer
